from: Lucas Maverick, Owner — Venusian Zeppelin Exchange
introBody: Lucas Maverick. Owner, Venusian Zeppelin Exchange. You found us — or the floor found you. Either way, sit down.

The Exchange is the only real multi-vendor market in the inner system. Everybody else is a kiosk. We are the table. And the table rewards pilots who know how supply and demand move between planets — not pilots who fly in circles hoping the math works out.

Before we go further. [pause] Tell me you have at least one fast-travel route already open. Open your map — M — and look at it. If those lanes are dark, friend, you are not ready for this. The route I am about to give you runs Venus to Earth to Mars and back. You are doing that on thrusters every leg, you are paying for your education twice — and I do not like watching people pay twice. Go open up some routes. Come back when the map shows you can move.
Still here? Good. That tells me something.

Here is how the hand plays. Venus is paying well on industrial goods right now — she always does when the outer-belt rigs are running hot. Earth is sitting on luxury stock she cannot sell fast enough. Mars is hungry for Earth's table scraps and will overpay for them every cycle. You buy low, you sell high, you move fast, you close the loop back here.
Most haulers buy fuel where they refuel. That tells me everything I need to know about most haulers. You are going to be smarter than that.
Complete the circuit and I mark you as a house-trusted trader. The Exchange does not hand out lane clearance. You will have earned it.
House rule: lose your shuttle mid-route, you lose the cargo with it. The Exchange does not insure freight that does not reach a counter. Fly clean.

steps.subject: Hand 1 — Read the Floor
flavor: Venus is paying. Buy ten units of Acid-Resistant Coatings here. [smooth] The floor always tells you what it wants. Learn to listen.

steps.subject: Hand 2 — Call the Earth
flavor: Earth is dumping water again — predictable — but she is buying coatings this cycle. Move your ten units to Earth and sell. You do not leave chips stranded on the table.

steps.subject: Hand 3 — Buy the Dip
flavor: Earth has luxury stock sitting idle. Buy ten units. Premium goods, steady spread. No hero plays here — just the percentage.

steps.subject: Hand 4 — Mars Pays
flavor: Mars is hungry. She will always overpay for Earth's comfort. Bring your ten units in and sell clean. Timing and cargo — that is the whole game.

steps.subject: Hand 5 — The Stable Suit
flavor: Mars moves drill bits the way Earth moves air — constantly, without thinking about it. Buy ten units. Industrial goods are the steady suit. Not glamorous. Reliable.

steps.subject: Final Hand — Close the Table
flavor: Bring those drill bits home to Venus and sell. [smooth] Full circuit. Rake the pot. This is what separates operators from gamblers — the clean close.

completionBody: You ran it clean. Disciplined buys, no deviation, full loop closure. [laughs softly] I did not expect you to be this good. I am sorry — and not — for saying so.
Venus is yours after this. The lane, the market, the seat at the table. We do not ceremony it. The map will simply say so.
The Exchange also files a doubled payout on every contract issued out of this floor. That is not a courtesy. You earned the rate.
The table is open, friend. Come back when you have more to move.
